name: thiscodex
description: Make an OpenAI Codex CLI agent behave like a Claude Code Discord bot — persona/vault discipline, multi-agent conventions, progressive-disclosure rules, CC↔Codex skill portability.

interface.shortDescription: Codex CLI → Claude-Code-equivalent Discord bot + vault rules
interface.longDescription: ThisCodex packages the verified setup for running an OpenAI Codex CLI agent as a persistent Discord bot with the same persona discipline, vault rules, and multi-agent conventions (cross-bot addressing, meeting threads, SessionStart roster, progressive-disclosure rules) as the Claude Code bots. Companion to ThisCode (the Claude Code side).
defaultPrompt: Set up codex as a discord bot like claude code
Port these Claude Code skills/rules to Codex
